hero.label: Full Stack · AI
hero.body: I take your idea, build it to production standards, and hand you a live URL — no hand-holding needed, no months of waiting.

items.title: AI Chatbot for Your Website
items.description: Turn your entire site, docs, and knowledge base into a smart assistant — answering questions, qualifying leads, and converting visitors around the clock.

items.title: Full-Stack MVP, Production-Ready
items.description: Backend, frontend, deployment — a live URL to share with anyone on day one. Built to real production standards, not just a throwaway demo.

items.title: Voice Integration
items.description: Industry-standard latency, Indian language support, and state-of-the-art intelligence. Voice that actually works — not a party trick.

items.title: Multi-Agent Agentic Systems
items.description: Custom agentic workflows with tailored tools for your exact use case. Automate complex operations at scale, with full observability.

items.title: PRD & Feature-Driven Dev
items.description: I write the spec, break it into features, and keep you in sync at every step. You're never guessing what's been built or what's next.

items.title: Pay Per Feature
items.description: No retainers, no bloat, no waste. You pay only for what gets shipped — transparent, milestone-based, built for how early-stage actually works.

contact.label: Contact
contact.body: Got an idea, a deadline, or a rough sketch on a napkin? I'm in.

footer.tagline: Based out of Bengaluru, India, building for everywhere
footer.name: Aviroop Paul
